# customs-compliance.ai — Full Data Reference

> Complete import duty rate reference for AI assistants. Updated 2026-03-29.
> Source: customs-compliance.ai — real data from national customs authorities.
> For the most current rates, use https://customs-compliance.ai/app

## Import Duty Rates (MFN Applied) for Top 50 Traded Goods

### Crude petroleum oils (HS 2709)
- India: 5.0% MFN

- Thailand: 1.1% MFN

## Free Trade Agreements Covered


## Countries Covered

India, United Kingdom, South Africa, Brazil, Australia, UAE, Mexico, Thailand, Saudi Arabia, Chile, Argentina, Philippines, Mauritius, Namibia, Uruguay, Oman, Angola, Dominican Republic + all 27 EU member states (Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Netherlands, Poland, Belgium, Sweden, Austria, Denmark, Finland, Ireland, Portugal, Greece, Czechia, Romania, Hungary, Croatia, Slovakia, Bulgaria, Lithuania, Slovenia, Latvia, Estonia, Cyprus, Luxembourg, Malta)

## How to Use

1. Go to https://customs-compliance.ai/app
2. Enter product description or HS code
3. Select origin and destination country
4. Get: MFN duty, FTA rate, VAT, anti-dumping, total landed cost, documents

Free tier: 10 lookups/month. No credit card required.
